name: Bottle Can Float
short_description: Watch the bottles quietly flowing down the river, listen to the pleasant sound of running water, throw small stones into the water, and discover the small animals living by the river... I believe you will definitely gain a wonderful mood.
detailed_description:
🎮 Game Overview
Bottle Can Float is a relaxing drifting game where you can truly unwind. No goals, no pressure—just choose your favorite bottle or paper boat, gently set it on the water, and let the gentle current carry you through ever-changing scenery on a soothing, go-with-the-flow journey.

✨ Core Features

🌿 An Immersive & Free Drifting Experience

  • Pick your traveling companion from a variety of bottles and paper boats, each with its own unique floating feel and style.

  • Let the water guide you through forests, valleys, villages, and moonlit nights—every scene is crafted with care, featuring rich ambient sounds and beautiful visuals.

  • The game supports laid-back idle play: you can sit back and watch your bottle drift, or interact lightly with the river to add a touch of playful engagement.

🦋 A Lively & Living River Ecosystem

  • Observe and collect the little creatures living along the riverbanks and in the water: butterflies, dragonflies, damselflies, and fireflies may land softly on your vessel, while crabs, crayfish, frogs, and lizards hide among the stones, waiting to be discovered.

  • Each map features three unique types of fish to catch—complete your aquatic collection!

  • Lift larger rocks in the river to uncover hidden surprises and little secrets.

🎣 Relaxing & Engaging Interactions

  • Use stones you find along the way to skip them across the water—challenge yourself to beat your highest bounce count and enjoy the satisfaction of watching ripples spread.

  • Or simply toss pebbles into the water or toward your floating bottle, savoring the calm ripples and nostalgic joy of playing by a river in simpler times.

🗺️ Four Beautifully Distinct Routes

  • The base game includes three themed rivers: a sun-dappled stream, an autumn riverbank glowing with red leaves, and a serene night scene lit by fireflies.

  • The free DLC Paper Boat Drift adds a brand-new environment: become a folded paper boat and drift through a poetic origami-inspired world, experiencing a uniquely lightweight journey.

🏆 Rich Collection & Achievement System

  • Unlock over 20 collection-based achievements, from catching animals and fish to mastering stone-skipping and discovering hidden content.

  • Perfect for players who enjoy gentle progression and the quiet satisfaction of completing small goals as they drift along.

🛶 A Peaceful Moment Just for You
Bottle Can Float is more than just a game—it's a quiet corner you can return to whenever you need a moment of calm. Whether you want to unwind for a few minutes or lose yourself in a longer float, you'll always find the gentle sound of flowing water, shifting light, and the warmth of life along the banks.

Pick a bottle, or set a paper boat free… and let the river carry you somewhere you don’t need to rush.

supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Russian*, Japanese*, Traditional Chinese*, Korean*
*languages with full audio support
